finding_results.notes: Replaced the clipped euphemistic memo line with a complete causal sentence ("due to legal and contractual limits") and added a specific physical consequence tied to Thomas Pike if the lane is exploited.
Thomas now makes an explicit operational decision (no donor bypass, public screening, no receiving line), and Lena's assignment list directly encodes that decision as deployment restrictions.
Removed taxonomy-like "stress tells" phrasing and replaced it with embodied stress behavior (cadence shift, over-stacked clauses, Ida's tactile correction).

Reworked the corridor confrontation to separate idiolect under pressure: Kline now uses contractor/field-ops framing (throughput, liability, choke points), Lena compresses into hard burst syntax, and Eleanor maintains legalistic control with formal qualifiers and self-revision. Added explicit pressure artifacts via cut-off and interruption at 271-273 and 281-283 while preserving scene facts and authority constraints.

Injected explicit Lena interiority (memory, bodily sensation, self-monitoring, and evaluative pressure) into the opening run before line 55 to preserve close-third anchoring and prevent long exterior-only paragraph stretches.
